SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IRiskScore.ICategoryScore

All Known Implementing Classes:
ImmutableCategoryScore, RiskScore.CategoryScore
Enclosing interface:
IRiskScore
public static interface IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
Per-category score details.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IRiskScore.ScoreCategory
    getCategory()
    Built-in category enum, or null for custom user-defined categories.
    default String
    getCategoryKey()
    String key identifying this category.
    IRiskScore.IDeduction[]
    getDeductions()
    Individual deductions (matched rules) within this category.
    default IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic[]
    getDiagnostics()
    Diagnostics collected during this category's scoring.
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Human-readable display name for this category.
    IRiskScore.RiskLevel
    getRiskLevel()
    Risk level for this category based on its score.
    int
    getScore()
    Category sub-score (0-100), computed as average of matched rule scores.
    String
    getSummary()
    Summary text describing the category's findings.

  • Method Details

    • getCategory

      IRiskScore.ScoreCategory getCategory()
      Built-in category enum, or null for custom user-defined categories.
      Returns:
      Score category enum value, or null

    • getScore

      int getScore()
      Category sub-score (0-100), computed as average of matched rule scores.

    • getRiskLevel

      IRiskScore.RiskLevel getRiskLevel()
      Risk level for this category based on its score.
      Returns:
      Risk level

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Human-readable display name for this category.
      Returns:
      Display name

    • getSummary

      String getSummary()
      Summary text describing the category's findings.
      Returns:
      Summary string

    • getDeductions

      IRiskScore.IDeduction[] getDeductions()
      Individual deductions (matched rules) within this category.
      Returns:
      Array of deductions, empty if no rules matched

    • getCategoryKey

      default String getCategoryKey()
      String key identifying this category. For built-in categories, returns the enum name (e.g., "PROTOCOLS"). For custom categories, returns the YAML key string (e.g., "PCI_COMPLIANCE").
      Returns:
      Category key string, never null

    • getDiagnostics

      default IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic[] getDiagnostics()
      Diagnostics collected during this category's scoring.
      Returns:
      Array of diagnostics, empty if no issues
